# LEZAC explosion playback oracle fixture v1
# Synthetic parser fixture: verifies selected nonzero queue slots.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
command=dosbox-debug -c "mount c /tmp/lezac-dosbox-explosion" -c "c:" -c "DEBUG LEZAC.EXE"

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C
selected_debris_base=209E
selected_collapse_base=662F
selected_effect_base=C22E

break ghidra=1000:75F1 runtime=1A2B:75F1 label=bomb_expire_dispatch_call
break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:3A7E runtime=1A2B:3A7E label=damage_forward_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3B18 runtime=1A2B:3B18 label=damage_reverse_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3BB2 runtime=1A2B:3BB2 label=collapse_forward_pass
break ghidra=1000:3D46 runtime=1A2B:3D46 label=collapse_reverse_pass

dump DS:2090
2B3C:2090  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 93 03
2B3C:20A0  00 c0 04 05 00 00 00 6b 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:6610
2B3C:6610  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
2B3C:6620  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 06
2B3C:6630  0a 08 0a 09 00 02 03 05 00 04 02 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:C1E0
2B3C:C1E0  6b 6c 6d 6e 6f 70 71 72 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:C21E
2B3C:C21E  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
2B3C:C22E  18 00 28 00 84 75 08 05 20 00 30 00 85 75 09 05
